SELECT byteSlice(data, 5, 10) FROM test_table WHERE byteSlice(data, 0, 5) = 'Hello';
CREATE TABLE byte_test (id UInt32, content BLOB);
INSERT INTO byte_test VALUES (1, hex_decode('1234567890abcdef')), (2, hex_decode('fedcba0987654321'));
SELECT id, byteSlice(content, 0, 4) AS first_four FROM byte_test;
SELECT id, byteSlice(content, 0, length(content)) AS full_content FROM byte_test;
SELECT id, byteSlice(content, length(content)-4, 4) AS last_four FROM byte_test;
CREATE TABLE test_join (key UInt32, value BLOB);
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (1, hex_decode('abc')), (2, hex_decode('def'));
SELECT t.id, byteSlice(t.value, 0, 3) AS sliced_value FROM (SELECT key, value FROM test_join) AS t WHERE t.key = 1;
SELECT t1.id, byteSlice(t2.value, 1, 2) AS sliced_value FROM byte_test AS t1 JOIN test_join AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.key;
SELECT id, byteSlice(content, 1, 0) AS empty_slice FROM byte_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, byteSlice(content, 10, 20) AS out_of_bounds FROM byte_test WHERE id = 2;
